mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: jaundice, hypthyroidism, cardiac problems (valvular and chamber anomalies), hepatic dysfunction, growth retardation, skeletal anomalies (long thorax)

neurological symptoms (restless, mydriasis, perseverative thoughts), liver involvement (hepatosplenomegaly, cholestasis), pulmonary manifestations (pleurisy, interstitial lung disease), foam cells in various organs

coarse facial features, short stature, progressive motor deterioration, corneal cloudiness, heart disease (mitral stenosis or regurgitation), respiratory issues (stridor, sleep apnea), hearing impairment
muscular weakness, enlarged heart, respiratory distress, feeding difficulties, hepatomegaly, hypoglycemia
joint hypermobility, skin fragility, easy bruising, intestinal complications (hernias, malabsorption), vascular instability leading to varices and hemorrhages

renal symptoms (proteinuria, glomerulosclerosis), angiokeratomas, neuropathic pain, gastrointestinal disturbances (abdominal cramps, diarrhea), cardiac involvement (left ventricular hypertrophy, arrhythmias)
seizures, cognitive deficits, adrenocortical hamartomas causing hormonal imbalance, benign tumors affecting multiple organ systems including kidneys, eyes, brain, lungs, and skin
demyelination with early onset spastic paraplegia, irritability, poor feeding, vomiting, urinary frequency, constipation, seizures, optic nerve damage resulting in vision loss
dwarfism, kyphoscoliosis, herniated lumbar discs, corneal opacities, cardiopulmonary compromise due to thickened cartilage narrowing airways and stiffening heart valves
